info.name: Kachō VPC Internal Smoke (kacho-only)
info.description: Kachō-specific integration smoke (NetBox VRF/Prefix/IP sync). Не имеет YC-аналога — эти кейсы запускаются только в --env local.

item.name: NETBOX-NETWORK-UPDATE-DESC-SYNC — Network description rename propagates to NetBox VRF
item.description:
Findings: NETBOX-INTEGRATION.md, NETBOX-UPDATE-SYNC.md | Status: Kachō implementation regression | Techniques: State-transition (PROVISIONING -> ACTIVE), idempotent observation

Sub-phase: vpc-controllers reconciliation (NetBox UPDATE sync).
Spec: PATCH /vpc/v1/networks/{id} с updateMask='description' должен (а) синхронно вернуть Operation, (б) после worker-execute — GET network показать новое description, (в) eventually-consistent — vpc-controllers через outbox-event обновляет VRF.description в NetBox. Kachō-only assertion: проверяем что Kachō-state согласован после PATCH; side-effect в NetBox проверяется отдельно через manual smoke.

exec: console.log('skip', "NETBOX-NETWORK-UPDATE-DESC-SYNC \u2014 Network description rename propagates to NetBox VRF");

item.name: NETBOX-SUBNET-UPDATE-NAME-SYNC — Subnet name rename propagates to NetBox Prefix description
item.description:
Findings: NETBOX-INTEGRATION.md, NETBOX-UPDATE-SYNC.md | Status: Kachō implementation regression | Techniques: State-transition, idempotent observation

Sub-phase: vpc-controllers reconciliation (NetBox UPDATE sync).
Spec: PATCH /vpc/v1/subnets/{id} с updateMask='name' → Operation success → GET subnet возвращает новое name. NetBox-side: Prefix.description JSON содержит kacho_name обновлённое (stable lookup-ключ kacho_subnet_id сохраняется). Kachō-state assertion только; NetBox side-effect — manual smoke.

item.name: NETBOX-ADDRESS-UPDATE-DESC-SYNC — Address description rename propagates to NetBox IP description
item.description:
Findings: NETBOX-INTEGRATION.md, NETBOX-UPDATE-SYNC.md | Status: Kachō implementation regression | Techniques: State-transition, idempotent observation

Sub-phase: vpc-controllers reconciliation (NetBox UPDATE sync).
Spec: PATCH /vpc/v1/addresses/{id} с updateMask='description' → Operation success → GET address возвращает новое description. NetBox-side: IPAddress.description JSON содержит kacho_description обновлённое (kacho_address_id stable). Kachō-state assertion только; NetBox side-effect — manual smoke.

item.name: NETBOX-ADDRESS-EXPLICIT-IP-REGISTER — explicit internalIpv4AddressSpec.address registered in NetBox
item.description:
Findings: NETBOX-EXPLICIT-IP.md, NETBOX-INTEGRATION.md | Status: Kachō implementation regression | Techniques: State-transition (explicit↔auto allocator coupling), Decision table, Idempotency.

Sub-phase: vpc-controllers reconciliation (NetBox explicit-IP path).
Spec: POST /vpc/v1/addresses with internalIpv4AddressSpec.address=10.66.0.50 must (a) succeed and store IP verbatim, (b) cause vpc-controllers to register the IP in NetBox via POST /api/ipam/ip-addresses/ (so NetBox knows it is taken), (c) make a subsequent Address.Create without explicit address NEVER allocate the same .50 (next-available skips it).

We assert this end-to-end through Kachō API only: GET both addresses, compare IPs. NetBox side-effect is observed indirectly via the auto-alloc skip behaviour.

exec: console.log('skip', "NETBOX-ADDRESS-EXPLICIT-IP-REGISTER \u2014 explicit internalIpv4AddressSpec.address registered in NetBox");

item.name: nbaip.5: GET op → auto-allocated IP returned

exec: // auto-allocated IP at op-create time may still be empty (filled by reconciler);
// the real assertion is in step 6 against the resource itself.
console.log('skip', "NETBOX-ADDRESS-EXPLICIT-IP-REGISTER \u2014 explicit internalIpv4AddressSpec.address registered in NetBox");

header.description: empty in local env, 'Bearer ...' in yc env

item.name: nbaip.6: GET auto address → IP allocated, NOT 10.66.0.50

exec: // NetBox-reconciler is async: SetInternalIP RPC fires after the
// outbox-event is consumed by vpc-controllers. Poll up to 30 iterations
pm.test('auto IP must NOT collide with explicit 10.66.0.50', () => pm.expect(ip).to.not.eql('10.66.0.50'));
pm.test('auto IP populated within 30 polls', () => pm.expect.fail('reconciler did not allocate IP within 30 polls'));
console.log('skip', "NETBOX-ADDRESS-EXPLICIT-IP-REGISTER \u2014 explicit internalIpv4AddressSpec.address registered in NetBox");

header.description: empty in local env, 'Bearer ...' in yc env
